## Purpose
This file serves as a configuration for the DiffDoc tool, specifying how it should operate in a local environment.

## User-Visible Behavior
Users will observe that the DiffDoc tool is configured to run with specific parameters, including a command to execute and a timeout setting.

## Business Rules
The configuration enables the DiffDoc tool and sets a timeout of 10 seconds for its operations. The command to be executed is defined as an array.

## Data Inputs And Outputs
The input is the configuration settings defined in the JSON structure, and the output is the behavior of the DiffDoc tool when executed with these settings.

## Operational Notes
The configuration specifies a command that uses `npx` to run the DiffDoc tool with a configuration file located at `./.diffdocrc`. The tool is set to operate locally.
